mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity (title, publisher_id, start_time, end_time, location, description, status, approval_status, max_participants, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{publisherId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{description}, #{status}, #{approvalStatus}, #{maxParticipants}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity WHERE publisher_id = #{publisherId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE activity SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
